utility_evaluation.REASONING:

2. financing – present and fully detailed (solution, down_payment, interest_rate, loan_duration, fees).

4. moving_services – present and includes description and cost. 
5. setup_services – present and includes description and cost. 
6. total_budget – present and includes breakdown. 
All six items are included and fully specified. The extra property_survey field is additional but doesn’t affect the completeness of the required items.
